import{j as e,l as y,t as w}from"./index-BrdSe0CA.js";import{b as l}from"./charts-7pOQm6Mk.js";import"./documents-Bhnlew-O.js";function k({expenses:o=[],language:s,safeBalance:h=0,setExpenses:m,setViewingExpense:b,showToast:n}){const u=w[s],[a,i]=l.useState(""),[r,d]=l.useState(0),[c,f]=l.useState("utilities"),[x,p]=l.useState(""),j=t=>{if(t.preventDefault(),!a||r<=0)return;if(h<r){n(s==="ar"?"رصيد الخزنة غير كافي لتغطية هذا المصروف!":"Insufficient cash in safe to cover this expense!","error");return}const N={id:`exp_${Date.now()}`,title:a,amount:r,category:c,date:new Date().toISOString(),notes:x};m(v=>[N,...v]),n(s==="ar"?"تم تقييد المصروف وخصمه من الخزنة!":"Expense recorded and deducted from Cash Safe!"),i(""),d(0),p("")};return e.jsxs("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6",children:[e.jsxs("div",{className:"md:col-span-4 bg-slate-50 p-5 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 space-y-4",children:[e.jsxs("h4",{className:"font-bold text-sm text-slate-800 flex items-center gap-1.5 border-b pb-2",children:[e.jsx(y,{className:"w-4.5 h-4.5 text-rose-500"}),s==="ar"?"تسجيل مصروف جديد":"Log Operational Cost"]}),e.jsxs("form",{onSubmit:j,className:"space-y-3.5 text-xs",children:[e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-650 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"عنوان المصروف ومسماه *":"Expense Title *"}),e.jsx("input",{type:"text",required:!0,value:a,onChange:t=>i(t.target.value),placeholder:"e.g., Office Rent June, electricity...",className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl py-2 px-3 font-bold"})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3",children:[e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-650 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"مبلغ المصروف ($) *":"Amount ($) *"}),e.jsx("input",{type:"number",required:!0,min:"0.01",step:"0.01",value:r,onChange:t=>d(Math.max(0,Number(t.target.value))),className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl py-2 px-3 font-bold text-rose-600"})]}),e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-650 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"تصنيف ومسار المصروف:":"Overhead Class:"}),e.jsxs("select",{value:c,onChange:t=>f(t.target.value),className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl py-2 px-3 outline-none",children:[e.jsx("option",{value:"salaries",children:s==="ar"?"رواتب الموظفين":"Staff Salaries"}),e.jsx("option",{value:"rent",children:s==="ar"?"إيجارات المستودعات":"Office Rent"}),e.jsx("option",{value:"utilities",children:s==="ar"?"فواتير (كهرباء/إنترنت)":"Overhead Utilities"}),e.jsx("option",{value:"marketing",children:s==="ar"?"تسويق وإعلانات":"Marketing Campaign"}),e.jsx("option",{value:"other",children:s==="ar"?"مصروفات تشغيلية أخرى":"Other Petty Cash"})]})]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-650 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"ملاحظات وتفاصيل إضافية:":"Overhead Notes:"}),e.jsx("textarea",{value:x,onChange:t=>p(t.target.value),placeholder:"Reference bank transfers, details...",className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl py-2 px-3 text-xs outline-none focus:ring-1",rows:3})]}),e.jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:"w-full bg-rose-600 hover:bg-rose-700 text-white font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded-xl shadow-md transition cursor-pointer",children:s==="ar"?"تقييد المصروف وخصمه":"Register Expense Bill"})]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"md:col-span-8 space-y-4",children:[e.jsx("span",{className:"text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider block",children:s==="ar"?"أرشيف المصروفات التشغيلية للمؤسسة":"Operational Expenditures Logs"}),e.jsx("div",{className:"border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden max-h-[350px] overflow-y-auto",children:e.jsxs("table",{className:"w-full text-left text-xs divide-y divide-slate-150",children:[e.jsx("thead",{className:"bg-slate-50 text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-bold uppercase",children:e.jsxs("tr",{children:[e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"مسما المصروف":"Expense Title"}),e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"التصنيف":"Class"}),e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"القيمة المالية":"Amount Paid"}),e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"التاريخ":"Payment Date"})]})}),e.jsx("tbody",{className:"divide-y divide-slate-150 text-slate-650",children:o.length===0?e.jsx("tr",{children:e.jsx("td",{colSpan:4,className:"px-4 py-8 text-center text-slate-400 font-bold",children:u.noData})}):o.map(t=>e.jsxs("tr",{className:"hover:bg-indigo-50/25 transition cursor-pointer",onClick:()=>b(t),title:s==="ar"?"اضغط لعرض التفاصيل وتصديرها":"Click to view full expense details",children:[e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 font-bold text-slate-800",children:String((t==null?void 0:t.title)??(s==="ar"?"مصروف بدون اسم":"Untitled expense"))}),e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase",children:e.jsx("span",{className:"bg-rose-55 text-rose-700 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-lg border border-rose-200/40",children:String((t==null?void 0:t.category)??"other")})}),e.jsxs("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 font-mono font-black text-rose-650",children:["-$",Number((t==null?void 0:t.amount)??0).toFixed(2)]}),e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 font-mono text-[10px] text-slate-400",children:t!=null&&t.date?new Date(t.date).toLocaleDateString():"-"})]},t.id))})]})})]})]})}export{k as ExpensesScreen};
